================================================================
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
================================================================
DevOps Engineer with hands-on experience in cloud infrastructure,
CI/CD automation, Linux server administration, and containerized
application deployment. Strong focus on improving release
workflows, system reliability, and operational efficiency across
production environments.

================================================================
CORE SKILLS
================================================================
Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP
Containers: Docker, Docker Compose, Kubernetes
CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI
Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation
Servers: Linux, Nginx, Apache
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack

================================================================
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
================================================================
DevOps Engineer
AbyM Technology
2025 - Present

- Deployed and maintained production applications on AWS EC2 and
  Linux servers.
- Built and managed CI/CD pipelines using Git and Jenkins for
  automated deployments.
- Managed Docker containers and improved deployment workflows for
  faster releases.
- Configured Nginx, domains, SSL certificates, and server security
  for production systems.
- Performed database backups, updates, and production maintenance.
- Worked with development teams to streamline release processes and
  improve deployment reliability.

DevOps Projects and Infrastructure
Personal / Company Projects
2025 - Present

- Deployed Django and Node.js applications on production servers.
- Configured Nginx reverse proxy and Gunicorn for application
  hosting.
- Managed MySQL and PostgreSQL databases in Linux environments.
- Implemented monitoring and troubleshooting practices for
  production systems.
- Handled SFTP access, server permissions, and environment setup.

================================================================
PROJECT HIGHLIGHTS
================================================================
CI/CD Pipeline Automation
- Automated build and deployment workflows using Jenkins, Git, and
  production server integration.

AWS Infrastructure Deployment
- Set up EC2-based application hosting with domain configuration,
  SSL, and reverse proxy support.

Dockerized Application Deployment
- Containerized web applications and managed services using Docker
  Compose.

Kubernetes Cluster Setup
- Worked on Kubernetes-based deployment setups with scaling,
  monitoring, and orchestration concepts.
